records.content: Discussed project architecture with the team. Decided to use Next.js 15 with static export for GitHub Pages deployment. The agent-memory-dashboard will aggregate OpenClaw agent state.
Implemented the Memory Explorer page. Features: full-text search, agent/source filters, expandable cards. Uses static JSON export from GitHub Actions.
CI pipeline configured. Pages deployment working on push to issue-1-scaffold branch. Build time ~1.3s, static assets optimized.
Design system established with Tailwind v4. Dark mode support via CSS variables. Sidebar navigation scaffold ready for all 4 dashboard sections.
Sprint 2026-03-09 planned. Priority order: 1) Scaffold, 2) Memory Explorer, 3) Inference Analytics, 4) Session Timeline, 5) Sprint Board.
Added TypeScript types for memory export and client-side filtering utilities. Implemented fuzzy search on content and tags.
Data export schema defined: GitHub Actions will read OpenClaw SQLite stores and produce JSON for the dashboard.
